title: Iranian Drone and Missile Barrage Against Kuwait Inflames Regional Tensions
summary_full: One person was killed and dozens were injured at Kuwait’s international airport. Tehran denied it had struck the airport.
summary_public: One person was killed and dozens were injured at Kuwait’s international airport. Tehran denied it had struck the airport.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iranian Drone and Missile Barrage Against Kuwait Inflames Regional Tensions
